mapper.sql: SELECT s.*, up.name AS member_name, cu.name AS trainer_name FROM crm_sales s LEFT JOIN user_profiles up ON up.user_id = s.member_id LEFT JOIN crm_users cu ON cu.id = s.trainer_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO crm_sales (id, gym_id, member_id, sales_type, reg_type, trainer_id, amount, sale_date, note, created_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{gymId}, #{memberId}, #{salesType}, #{regType}, #{trainerId}, #{amount}, #{saleDate}, #{note}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT sales_type AS salesType, SUM(amount) AS total, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM crm_sales WHERE gym_id = #{gymId} AND DATE_FORMAT(sale_date, '%Y-%m') = #{monthYear} GROUP BY sales_type
